overview: Bubba's 33 Roadie Training — a position-based training library with admin tools for managing categories, items, and detail fields, plus a bulk import tool for creating many entries at once from a JSON blob.
features: Per-position Library admin page with categories and items
Manual create/edit/delete for categories and items with per-parent sort ordering
Detail fields with label and value per item, plus tags, seasonal flag, and notes
Admin-only bulk import tool to paste JSON and create many categories and items at once
Dark Bubba's 33 roadhouse theme with red, navy, gold, and sage accents
